title: neurophyllodes kauaiensis
intro: Neurophyllodes kauaiensis, also known as the Kauai vine or Kauai iliahi, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. Traditionally, the leaves and stems of this plant have been used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neurophyllodes kauaiensis include reducing pain and swelling, and it has also been used to treat various skin conditions and wounds. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used to make a salve or ointment for topical application.
